title: Fix test suite — get critical tests passing
description: PRD gap: test suite has ~29 failures across 11 files. CRITICAL BUILD BLOCKER: src/runtime/embed.js imports { embed } from agentic-embed but agentic-embed only exports: create, chunkText, cosineSimilarity, localEmbed. Fix the import to use the correct export (likely localEmbed or create). Then fix remaining test failures. Focus: (1) Fix embed.js import, (2) Fix broken imports/stale references from recent refactors, (3) Target: core module tests pass (llm, stt, tts, brain, hub, api). Do NOT write new tests — fix existing broken ones.
